verifyBanner.title: Intambwe ya nyuma — genzura amakuru yawe
verifyBanner.description: Soma kandi ushire akamenyetso kuri buri gasandugu kugira ngo wohereze ukwiyandikisha kwawe.

aboutCopaTitle: Ikibanza co kuronsa abikorera mu Burundi
aboutCopaDesc1: COPA ni igikorwa c'Umushinga PRETE, ushikirizwa n'Isoko ry'Isi. Intumbero yacu: kurondera, gufasha no gutanga inkunga ku bicuruzwa bikiri binini canke bitoyi mu Burundi bishoboye.
aboutCopaDesc2: COPA igamije abikorera bose, cane cane abakenyezi bikorera n'abahunze bifuza guteza imbere ibikorwa vyabo mu Burundi.
step1Desc: Ugire konti yawe maze uzuze amakuru yawe mu minota mikeyi.
step2Desc: Kurikira amahugurwa kubuntu kugira ngo ubone ubumenyi bukenewe bwo kwandika gahunda nziza.
step3Desc: Andika kandi utange gahunda yawe mbere y'umunsi w'impera. Abahinga bacu bazo isuzuma mu buryo bubereye.
step4Desc: Ni wahigwa, ronka inkunga n'ubufasha mu gutanguza umushinga wawe.
impactDesc: Ubushigikire bw'ibicuruzwa, inkunga zatanzwe n'akazi karenguwe.
testimonial1Text: Cokimuriwe na COPA, nabaye gushobora guhindura ubucuruzi bwanje butoyi mw'igicuruzwa gikomeye. Amahugurwa yampaye icizigiro n'inkunga yampaye kugura ibikoresho vya none. Ubu, ndakoresha abantu 5!
testimonial2Text: Mfashijwe na COPA, umushinga wanje wavuye mw'igitekerezo gusa wabaye igicuruzwa giteguruwe neza. Inama nahaye zampaye gushobora gutunganya imari yanje n'inkunga yoroheje kugura ibikoresho vy'ingenzi. Ubu, ndabikorera abakiriya benshi kandi naremye akazi 4!
testimonial3Text: Ubufasha bwa COPA bwamye ihindagurika rikomeye ku bucuruzi bwanje. Urufatiro rwampaye gushobora gutunganya imari yanje n'inkunga yampaye kwongereza ubushobozi bwanje. Ubu, amacuruzi yanje yaragwiyekanye kandi naremye akazi 4 mashasha!
blogTitle1: Imahere anyu arabanje? Gerageza aya majambo 10
blogDesc1: Ico ukoze mugutegura canke mugutwara, intumbero igomba kwibandwa kurufatiro.
blogTitle2: Urimo kwimura ibikorwa vyawe mu yandi mahanga?
blogDesc2: Uwubitsa ibikorwa agomba kwitaho ibibazo birenze uguhitamo gusa!
blogDesc3: Bishobora kuba ivyavuka canke ivy'inyongera, kandi ivyakurikiye birashobora gutangaza...
blogTitle4: Ni gute twakemura amakenga mu bakenge?
blogDesc4: Ico ukoze mugutegura canke mugutwara, intumbero igomba kwibandwa kurufatiro.
bannerDescription: Hindura igitekerezo cawe mu bucuruzi bukora. COPA ifasha ibicuruzwa bikiri binini canke bitoyi mu Burundi kwiga, kuronka ubufasha n'inkunga kugira ngo mushobore kugera ku ntego zanyu.

project.title: Umushinga w'Akazi n'Iterambere ry'Ubukungu
project.description: PRETE ni umushinga wa Leta y'Uburundi, ufashwa na Banki y'Isi, ufise intego yo guteza imbere iterambere ry'ubukungu no kurema akazi mu gihugu. Ufise ingengo y'imari ingana miliyoni 100 z'amadolari y'Amerika, kandi uzomara imyaka 5 (2024-2028).

list: Guteza imbere ubwingenzi bw'abakenyezi n'impunzi mu bukungu

list.title: Iterambere ry'ibigo bito
list.desc: Gushigikira ubushobozi bw'ibigo bito n'ibiciriritse mu Burundi biciye mu gice ca 1.2 'Kunoza ubushobozi bw'ibigo' ari naco gitwara gahunda ya COPA.

list.title: Kunoza ibihe vy'ubucuruzi
list.desc: Ivugurura ry'imigenderanire yo kugabanya ingendo, kworoshya kwandikisha ibigo no kurinda abashora imari.

list.title: Ukubona inkunga
list.desc: Guteza imbere uburyo bw'inkunga ku bigo bito n'ibiciriritse, harimwo ingwara ndende n'inkunga itishyurwa.

list.title: Ubwingenzi mu bukungu
list.desc: Gahunda zifise intego yo kwinjiza abakenyezi, urubyiruko n'impunzi mu bukungu bw'Uburundi.

copa.title: Igice ca 1.2
copa.subtitle: COPA: gahunda nyamukuru ya PRETE
copa.description: Igice ca 1.2 'Kunoza ubushobozi bw'ibigo' gitwara COPA, iyambere mu gushigikira abacuruzi b'Uburundi.
copa.description2: COPA ikoranya amahugurwa, ubuyobozi n'inkunga kugira ngo ishigikiye abafise imishinga myiza n'ishobora gutsimbataza.

cta.title: Uriteguriye kwinjira muri gahunda ya COPA?
cta.description: Iyandikishe ubu kugira ngo uhabwe ubufasha bukwiye bwo guteza imbere ubucuruzi bwawe.

intro.title: COPA
intro.subtitle: Irirushanwa ry'Imishinga y'Ubucuruzi
intro.description1: COPA niryo shingiro rikomeye mu gice ca 1.2 ca PRETE. Ni gahunda yuzuye yo gufasha abacuruzi b'Uburundi, ikoranya amahugurwa, ubuyobozi n'inkunga.
intro.description2: COPA iha abafise imishinga myiza umwanya wo guteza imbere ubumenyi bwabo no kubona inkunga itishyurwa kugira ngo bashobore kurangiza intego zabo.

list.title: Amahugurwa
list.desc: Guteza imbere ubumenyi mu bucuruzi n'ubuyobozi binyuze mu mahugurwa akwiye, haba mu maso no kuri interineti.

list.title: Irirushanwa
list.desc: Isuzuma ry'umutekano ry'ibikorwa ry'ubucuruzi n'abahanga, hakurikijwe amategeko.

list.title: Inkunga
list.desc: Ihabwa abatsinze kugira ngo bashobore kurangiza imishinga yabo y'ubucuruzi.

section.title: Ni nde ashobora kwitabira?
section.subtitle: COPA irakirira abantu bose
section.description: COPA irakirira amasosiyete yose yemewe n'amategeko, kandi yitaye cyane ku matsinda akurikira:

cta.title: Uriteguriye kwitabira Irirushanwa ry'Imishinga?
cta.description: Fungura konte yawe utangire urugendo rwawe muri COPA uyu munsi.

form.title: Twumvikane
form.subtitle: Saba ko twoguhamura
form.description: Tugufashe gute? Fungura konte yawe utangire urugendo rwawe muri COPA uyu munsi.
form.name: Izina ryawe
form.subject: Ikiganiro

posts.author: Jean Dupont
posts.title: Uko abashakashatsi bakoresha ubumenyi bwabo hanze y'akazi
posts.excerpt: Niba ufise icumbiro ryo kumenya uko wofasha wenyene canke abandi n'ubumenyi bw'ubushakashatsi hanze y'akazi, abagenzi bawe ubuhinga baronse ubumenyi bushasha.

posts.author: Jean Dupont
posts.title: Rema ifoto yawe y'amakuru y'ubucuruzi ku buntu
posts.excerpt: Microsoft Outlook hamwe n'ibindi bikoresho biraraho, ariko ushobora kwiyubakira ikigega c'amakuru ku buntu kugira ngo usangire n'abagenzi bawe.

posts.author: Jean Dupont
posts.title: Raporo 2021 y'uburyo bushasha bwo gushaka abakozi
posts.excerpt: 80% y'abayobozi b'isi yose barerekana ko inzira yabo yo gufata abakozi ubu ikorwa kure. Muri raporo, ushobora kubona ukuri kwinshi n'ubumenyi bushobora gufasha kunoza inzira yawe.

applicationSubmitted.title: Kwemeza gusaba
applicationSubmitted.notification: Uzomenyeshwa email na SMS mugihe ibisubizo vy'itora ryambere bizotanga.

sectionTitle.title: Kurikiza izi ntambwe kugira ngo wongere amahirwe yawe
sectionTitle.description: Kwitaba COPA, biroroshye ! Kurikiza izi ntambwe 7 kugira ngo wongere amahirwe yawe yo gutsinda no kubona inkunga yo guteza imbere ubucuruzi bwawe.

desc.intro: Mbere yo kwiyandikisha, raba niba uzuza ibisabwa byo kwitaba COPA. Ibisabwa nyamukuru ni :
criteria: Kuba uri MPME yemewe cyangwa uri mu nzira yo kwemererwa mu Burundi
Kugira umushinga w'ubucuruzi ufite ishingiro kandi wahitajwe

desc.intro: Fungura konti yawe mu minota mikeyi. Uzakenera :
criteria: Aderesi ya email ikora cyangwa numero ya telefone

steps.title: Uzuza profili yawe
steps.desc: Nyuma yo kwiyandikisha, uzuza profili yawe yombi amakuru asabwa: amakuru yihariye, amakuru kuri sosiyete, inyandiko zemeza. Profili yuzuye yongerera amahirwe yo gutorwa.

steps.title: Kurikira amahugurwa
steps.desc: Gira uruhara mu mahugurwa ategetswe yo kwandika gahunda y'ubucuruzi. Aya mahugurwa ni ayubuntu kandi araboneka mu maso cyangwa kuri interineti. Azoguha ibisabwa byose byo kwandika gahunda y'ubucuruzi ikomeye.

steps.title: Andika kandi utange gahunda yawe y'ubucuruzi
steps.desc: Koresha ibikoresho bya porogaramu kwandika gahunda yawe y'ubucuruzi. Ushobora kubika akazi kawe ukagakomeza igize cyose ukeneye mbere y'umunsi w'impera wo gutanga.
steps.note: Raba amatariki yo gutanga muri kalendari ya COPA.

steps.title: Tegereza ibisubizo
steps.desc: Gahunda yawe izarerwa n'itsinda ry'inzobere mu kujijuka hakurikijwe ibipimo bigaragara. Uzamenyeshwa ibisubizo biciye muri email na SMS.
steps.note: Isuzuma rimara iminsi 10 kugeza 15 nyuma yo gufunga amatariki yo gutanga.

criteria: Gufasha guhagaze ku giti cyawe mu gushyira mu bikorwa

cta.title: Tangira urugendo rwawe rwa COPA uyu munsi !
cta.description: Kwiyandikisha ni ubuntu kandi ntibirana umwanya munini.

intro.title: Raba niba ufise uburenganzira bwo kwitabira COPA
intro.description: COPA ifunguriwe MPME zuzuza ibisabwa bikurikira. Raba niba uboneye mbere yo kwiyandikisha.

enterprise.title: Ibisabwa ku isosiyete
items: Kuba uri micro, ntoya cyangwa iciriritse ukurikije itegeko ry'igihugu
Kuba wanditswe mu buryo bwemewe mu Burundi CYKA kwiyemeza kwandikwa nihaba waratoranyijwe
Gukora mu rwego rwemewe (raba urutonde ruri munsi)
Kutagira ideni utishura ku Gihugu cyangwa mu bigo by'imari (OBR/INSS/n'ibindi)

promoter.title: Ibisabwa ku washinze isosiyete
items: Kuba uri umunyarwanda CYKA impunzi yanditswe mu Burundi
Kutigeze ubona inkunga ya COPA mu myaka yashize

eligibleList.label: Ubuhinzi n'ibiribwa
eligibleList.desc: Umusaruro, guhindura, kubika no gucuruza ibikomoka ku buhinzi

eligibleList.label: Inganda z'ibikoresho
eligibleList.desc: Guhindura ibikoresho biboneka mu gihugu, gukora ibicuruzwa bifite agaciro

eligibleList.label: Ubucuruzi n'igurishwa
eligibleList.desc: Ubucuruzi buto n'ubunini, igurishwa ry'ibicuruzwa bya buri munsi

eligibleList.label: Ubukorikori n'umukono
eligibleList.desc: Gukora ibikoresho mu maboko, ibihangano, imyenda gakondo n'impu

eligibleList.label: Ikoranabuhanga n'ibiganiro
eligibleList.desc: Gutunganya porogaramu, e-commerce, serivisi za interineti, fintech

eligibleList.label: Ubuzima n'umubiri
eligibleList.desc: Serivisi z'ubuzima zo hafi, amafarama, ibikoresho by'ubuvuzi

eligibleList.label: Uburezi n'amahugurwa
eligibleList.desc: Ibigo by'amahugurwa y'umwuga, amashure y'urubyiruko, gufasha abanyeshuri

eligibleList.label: Ibidukikije n'ingufu
eligibleList.desc: Ingufu zisubirwamo, gucunga imyanda, ubuhinzi buramba

eligibleList.label: Ahoteli n'ibyokurya
eligibleList.desc: Resitora, abategura ibiribwa, aho gutura, ubukerarugendo bw'igihugu

excludedList.label: Ibikorwa by'urugomo
excludedList.desc: Ibikorwa byose by'urugomo cyangwa bitemewe n'amategeko y'Uburundi

excludedList.label: Itabi n'ibiyobyabwenge
excludedList.desc: Gukora, gucuruza cyangwa gukwirakwiza itabi, inzoga cyangwa ibiyobyabwenge

excludedList.label: Intwaro n'ibisasu
excludedList.desc: Ibikorwa bya gisirikare cyangwa ibya gisirikare

cta.title: Ufite ikibazo ku bisabwa ?
cta.description: Itsinda ryacu rihari kugufasha kumenya neza ibisabwa.

phases.description: Gufungura kwiyandikisha kuri porogaramu ya COPA. Gufungura konti no kuzuza amakuru yombi. Igihe co gukangurira no gutanga amakuru.
phases.tips: Koresha iki gihe kugira ngo utore inyandiko zawe kandi utegeke amakuru kuri sosiyete yawe.

phases.description: Amasomo y'amahugurwa ategetswe kw'ubucuruzi no kwandika gahunda y'ubucuruzi. Araboneka mu maso (Bujumbura, Gitega, Ngozi) no kuri interineti.
phases.tips: Gira uruhara mu masomo menshi kugira ngo uteze imbere ubwiza bwa gahunda yawe y'ubucuruzi.

phases.description: Gutanga gahunda z'ubucuruzi kuri porogaramu. Ushobora gutanga gahunda yawe igihe icyo ari co cose muri iki gihe. Uzohererezwa konfirmasiyo kuri email na SMS.
phases.tips: Ntutegerezanye gutanga gahunda mu mwanya w'impera. Tegura gahunda yawe kera.

phases.description: Isesengura n'isuzuma ry'agahunda z'ubucuruzi zatanzwe n'itsinda ry'inzobere mu kujijuka. Gukoresha urutonde rw'ibipimo bigaragara.
phases.tips: Abasuzuma bareba: ubushobozi bw'ubukungu, ubuhangange, ingaruka ku muryango/ibidukikije, ubushobozi bwo gushyira mu bikorwa.

phases.description: Gushyira ku mugaragaro urutonde rw'atsinze. Kumenyeshwa kwa buri muntu ku giti ciwe biciye muri email na SMS. Inama y'abanyamakuru itemewe.
phases.tips: Mwiyandikishe kuri newsletter yacu kugira ngo ubone amakuru ako kanya nyuma yo gutangaza ibisubizo.

phases.description: Guhurira n'atsinze kugira ngo basinye amasezerano y'inkunga. Kwerekana gahunda yo gushyira mu bikorwa na kalendari yo kwishyura.
phases.tips: Amasezerano asobanura uburyo bwo kwishyura n'ibikenewe mugihe cyo gutanga raporo.

cta.title: Kwiyandikisha birafunguye !
cta.description: Ntucikeza umwanya w'umwaka wa 2026 wa COPA. Mwiyandikishe ubu.

success.title: Ikibazo cawe caranditswe
success.message: Urakoze kutubwira iki kibazo. Turafata ibibazo vyose hafi kandi tubikora mu ibanga.
notifications: Komeza numero y'ikibazo cawe kugira ngo ukurikire aho kigeze.

intro.title: Menyesha ikibazo canke amakosa
intro.description: COPA yiyemeje gufata ibibazo vyawe hafi kandi mu ibanga. Niba ubonye ikibazo, amakosa, canke ugirirwa nabi, ntukagire ingahe kutubwira.

description.placeholder:
Isobanuro riramba ry'ikibazo *
Sobanura neza ibyabaye, igihe, ukuntu, n'uwari muri byo...

files.hint: Inyandiko, amafoto, amashusho — max 5 idosiye, 10 Mo buri imwe

consent.label: Nemera ko amakuru yanje akoreshwa mu ibanga n'itsinda rya COPA nk'uko bigenda muri politiki yo gukoresha amakuru.

priority.label: Ubwihutirwa: {{priority}}
priority.vbgNote: — Ubu bwoko bw'ikibazo buzoshikirizwa abahinga bahari.

errors.consentRequired: Ugomba kwemera uburyo bwo gukoresha amakuru.

validation.acceptTerms: Ugomba kwemera uburyo bwo gukoresha amakuru.
